title: rubus dasyacanthus
intro: Rubus dasyacanthus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family. It has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Rubus dasyacanthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant support. Rubus dasyacanthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
